steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is lost works (plural noun). The parenthetical phrase “no copy of which exists” is set off by dashes and doesn't change the subject number. The verb must agree with lost works.

steps.title: Match the verb to the plural subject
steps.content: A plural subject requires a plural verb. Have become is the only plural form among the choices, matching the plural subject. B, C, and D are all singular verbs, which violate subject-verb agreement with the plural subject. That matches choice A — A is correct.
